message:
feat(core): window function tracing and lock-byte page quick_check test

Two additions to the connection layer:

1. Window function profiling: add FSQLITE_WINDOW_FUNC_PARTITIONS_TOTAL
   atomic counter and HotPathProfileSnapshot field for partition-count
   tracking. New window_frame_type_label() helper classifies frame type.
   Conditional tracing::debug! span emitted per window function
   evaluation with func name, partition count, and frame type. Hoists
   fname binding out of the per-partition loop.

2. New test test_pragma_quick_check_reports_lock_byte_page_reference —
   injects a corrupted child pointer referencing the reserved lock-byte
   page into an interior B-tree node, then asserts PRAGMA quick_check
   detects and reports the corruption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
